L.-33004/99 9iHcF ^ ?i5ra$r £he (Baxette of «3nclia EXTRAORDINARY m»r ii—TOOT 3—^xr-iaro» (ii) PART U—Section 3—Sub-section (ii) PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY tf. 819] No. 819| ^ f^pft, ^pror, ^wif 28,2006/*Pnrr 6,1928 NEW DELHI, FRIDAY, JULY 28,2006/SRAVANA6,1928 ~*$ »fHI*W ^ fif5#, 28 ^CT^, 2006 SRT.31T. 1 2 1 6 ( 3 l ) . - 3 n W TflftR STfafoW, 2005 (2005 ^T 53) tft STRJ 1 ^W-m ( 3 ) SRITRrf *lf*RPlf 3>T TraW ^ 5 ^ jJH, «frs W * K K<l\fiKI 28 ^?TOf, 2006 ^ ^t m 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, 8, 10, 75, 77 afo 79 3 1 ^ # i r I [ m u 30/i/2O06-^h?T-niW3 MINISTRY OF HOME AFFAIRS NOTIFICATION New Delhi, the 28th Jury, 2006 S.0.1216(E).—In exercise of the powers conferred by Sub-section (3) of Section 1 of the Disaster Management Act, 2005 (53 of 2005), the Central Government hereby appoints the 28th day of July, 2006 as the date on which the provisions of Sections 2,3,4,5,6,8,10,75,77 and 79 of the said Act shall come into force. [F.No. 30/l/2006-NDM-III(A)] NAVEENVERMA, Jt Secy. 2312 GI/200A Printed by die Manager. Govt of India Press. Ring Road.
